title: 2025107Wetreport5K88J447
summary:
Main
• VLCC Market Softens as Post Golden Week Demand Fails to Gain Traction - As September ends, the previously robust VLCC market driven by tight supply and high activity has shown signs of softening in demand, with spot rates retreating from the multi-year highs reached recently. The pullback highlights the market's fragility and its sensitivity to incremental small shifts in demand. Sentiment weakened further as the anticipated post-Golden Week rebound did not materialize.
